title: Monorepo Scaffold and Development Standardization (Formatting, Linting, Testing, Packaging) for Python + Frontend + Contracts
description: Create the complete repository structure, code standards, and local development pipeline for all components: discovery-service (Python/FastAPI), sentinel (Python/FastAPI), shared libraries (Python), blockchain contracts (Solidity), and frontend (React/MUI). This task creates all scaffolding files — pyproject.toml, Makefile, pre-commit hooks, etc.
objectives: Clear and unified repository structure for multiple engineering teams
Local reproducibility (make targets) with unified code standards
Clear separation between shared crypto libraries and application code

implementation_guidance.overview: Set up a Python monorepo (not using a monorepo tool like nx for Python, but managed via workspace pyproject.toml and per-package pyproject.toml files). Use ruff for linting/formatting, mypy for type checking, pytest for testing. Use Vite for the React frontend. Use Hardhat for Solidity contracts.
steps: Step 1 - Top-Level Directory Structure: Create the following top-level directories: /services (application services), /libs (shared libraries), /contracts (Solidity), /frontend (React UI), /docs (architecture/design docs), /scripts (utility scripts), /deploy (K8s/Helm/docker-compose), /tests (integration/e2e tests).

Step 2 - Services Directory Structure: /services/discovery/ — Discovery Service FastAPI application. /services/sentinel/ — Sentinel FastAPI application. Each service has the internal structure: src/{service_name}/ (source package), tests/ (unit + integration tests), pyproject.toml, Dockerfile, README.md.

Step 3 - Libs Directory Structure: /libs/common/ — shared Python library. Internal structure: src/common/crypto/ (DID key generation, JWS sign/verify, hashing), src/common/vc_schemas/ (Pydantic models for VC types — TASK-004), src/common/onboarding/ (enrollment token/proof — TASK-005), src/common/proof/ (ProofClaims — TASK-006), src/common/revocation/ (bitstring status list — TASK-007), src/common/secret_storage/ (SecretStorage interface — TASK-011), src/common/chain/ (web3.py client — TASK-020), src/common/telemetry/ (OTel utilities — TASK-012). Each sub-package has its own __init__.py and is importable independently.

Step 4 - Python Tooling Configuration (pyproject.toml per package): Use Python 3.11+. Each package has its own pyproject.toml with [build-system] using hatchling or setuptools. Base pyproject.toml at root configures: ruff (linting + formatting, replaces black+isort+flake8), mypy (strict mode for libs, non-strict for services allowed with justification), pytest with coverage (minimum 80% for libs). Key dependencies for services: fastapi>=0.111.0, uvicorn[standard]>=0.29.0, pydantic>=2.7.0, pydantic-settings>=2.2.0, sqlalchemy>=2.0.29 (async), alembic>=1.13.0, asyncpg>=0.29.0, httpx>=0.27.0, redis>=5.0.3, web3>=6.18.0, opentelemetry-sdk>=1.24.0, opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi>=0.45b0, prometheus-client>=0.20.0, cryptography>=42.0.0.

Step 5 - Ruff Configuration: In root pyproject.toml [tool.ruff]: line-length = 100, target-version = 'py311'. [tool.ruff.lint]: select = ['E','W','F','I','B','C4','UP','N','ANN','S','BLE','FBT','T20','SIM','ARG','PTH','PD','PL','TRY','PERF']. [tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]: tests/** = ['S101','ANN']. This enforces security rules (S), type annotations (ANN), and common bug patterns.

Step 6 - Mypy Configuration: [tool.mypy]: python_version = '3.11', strict = true for libs, warn_return_any = true, disallow_untyped_defs = true. Create mypy.ini or use pyproject.toml. For services, allow: disallow_untyped_defs = false (with justification in PR).

Step 7 - Test Configuration: [tool.pytest.ini_options]: testpaths = ['tests'], asyncio_mode = 'auto', addopts = '--cov=src --cov-report=html --cov-fail-under=80'. Use pytest-asyncio for async tests, pytest-httpx for HTTPX mocking, freezegun for time mocking.

Step 8 - Makefile: Create root Makefile with targets: install (pip install all packages in dev mode), lint (run ruff check on all), format (ruff format + ruff check --fix), type-check (run mypy on all), test (run pytest for all packages), test-unit (unit tests only), test-integration (integration tests only, requires docker-compose), build (build all Docker images), up (docker compose up), down (docker compose down), seed (run seed script), reset (docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d). Each target should work from the root directory.

Step 9 - Pre-commit Hooks: Create .pre-commit-config.yaml with hooks: ruff (check + format), mypy (libs only), detect-secrets (block secret patterns), check-yaml, check-json, end-of-file-fixer, trailing-whitespace. Install with pre-commit install.

Step 10 - Node/React Tooling: /frontend/discovery-ui/: package.json with React 18, @mui/material 5.x, Vite 5.x, TypeScript 5.x, eslint with typescript-eslint and react hooks rules, prettier. Scripts: dev, build, lint, type-check, test (vitest + @testing-library/react).

Step 11 - Solidity Tooling: /contracts/package.json with hardhat@2.22.x, @openzeppelin/contracts@5.x, @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox. npx hardhat test for unit tests. hardhat.config.ts with network configs.

Step 12 - .gitignore: Include __pycache__, *.pyc, .env, .env.*, *.key.enc, *private_key*, node_modules, dist, build, .venv, .mypy_cache, .ruff_cache, coverage/, htmlcov/, deployments/ (create deployments/.gitignore: !*.json to allow ABI artifacts only, no private keys).

Step 13 - Versioning: libs/common uses semantic versioning. Version defined in libs/common/pyproject.toml. Services declare dependency as common>=0.x.y. Internal API schema versioning: /api/v1/... prefix on all endpoints. Breaking changes in common libs require major version bump.

root_structure.pyproject.toml: Root Python tooling config (ruff, mypy, pytest settings)

security_constraints: detect-secrets pre-commit hook MUST be installed to prevent accidental secret commits
.gitignore MUST exclude all *.env files, private key files, and any file matching *secret* or *private*
Supply chain: all Python packages use exact pinned versions in lockfiles (pip-compile or poetry.lock)
Node packages use package-lock.json with npm ci in CI
No development/test credentials may be committed — use .env.example with placeholder values only

acceptance_criteria: make test runs all unit tests from repository root and passes
make lint runs ruff on all Python sources and reports no errors
make type-check runs mypy on libs/common and reports no errors
Directory structure matches the specification exactly
Pre-commit hooks are installed and block commits containing secrets
libs/common is importable by both discovery and sentinel services
All pyproject.toml files are valid and installable with pip install -e
